headline: Heat ramps to 99°F Friday — run zones today.
weather_notes: Run both zones this morning — 2 days dry entering a 96–99°F stretch through Friday; water before today's heat peaks.
Do all bed work before 9 AM through Friday — 96–99°F forecast with zero rain closes every afternoon outdoor window.
Check potato bag moisture daily this week — bags lose moisture 2–3× faster than ground beds in sustained 96–99°F heat.

suggested_tasks.title: Tip new blackberry primocanes if 3–4 ft tall
suggested_tasks.description: New canes logged June 14 are now 23 days old; tip at 3–4 ft now to promote lateral branching for next year's fruit.
